name: Orb Weaver Jr

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lowers itself slightly and snaps forward with open fangs.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block on the first movement or step back out of its short range.
attacks.notes: Its basic attack; the damage is low, but it is often backed up by nearby spiders.

attacks.name: 3-Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It raises its front legs and chains three quick bites together.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not counter after the first hit; block or dodge the full sequence.
attacks.notes: This is its main combo and can throw off early-game timing.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It tenses up before lunging in with a stronger bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge sideways when it commits to the lunge.
attacks.notes: The juvenile version of the orb weaver charge; it can inflict poison.

description: A younger, frailer variant of the orb weaver. It is usually found near nests and adult spiders, and it can still be dangerous in groups during the early game.
behavior: It patrols small areas around its webs and alternates between watching, sleeping, or trailing a nearby adult spider. Unlike adults, it does not create new webs or egg sacs.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks the player on sight and gives chase aggressively. It cannot web the player like the adult, but its charged bite still punishes careless movement.
interactionWithCreatures: It is passive toward other spiders and cannot harm them. It will also attack TAYZ.Ts in the lab, although it does not always connect well.
strategy: Spicy damage remains the best answer. The real danger is their numbers, so remove the juveniles first before an adult or a pack traps you at close range.
respawnInfo: Default: 2 days. Upper Yard: 1.75 days. Hedge Lab: 3 days.
specialTraits: Its charged bite can apply poison even though its move set is simpler than that of a full orb weaver.
